title: A Train Journey Through the Mountains

all.en: Last winter，I took the famous mountain train through the Swiss Alps with my parents.
all.zh: 去年冬天，我和父母搭乘著名的山岳列車穿越瑞士阿爾卑斯山。

all.en: The train had large panoramic windows that allowed us to enjoy the spectacular views.
all.zh: 列車有大型的全景車窗，讓我們能盡情欣賞壯麗的景色。

all.en: As we climbed higher，the landscape changed from green valleys to snowy peaks.
all.zh: 當我們越爬越高，景觀從綠色山谷變成了白雪皚皚的山峰。

all.en: Tiny wooden houses dotted the hillsides like pieces of a fairy tale.
all.zh: 小木屋點綴在山坡上，就像童話故事裡的場景。

all.en: The friendly conductor pointed out interesting sights as we passed each station.
all.zh: 親切的列車長在我們經過每個車站時介紹有趣的景點。

all.en: I drank a cup of hot chocolate from the snack cart to keep myself warm.
all.zh: 我從點心車買了一杯熱巧克力來保暖。

all.en: My father said the trip reminded him of postcards he had collected as a young man.
all.zh: 我父親說這趟旅行讓他想起年輕時收集的明信片。

all.en: We passed through several long tunnels carved deep into the rocky mountains.
all.zh: 我們穿過了好幾條深鑿入岩石山脈中的長隧道。

all.en: At one point，the train crossed a tall stone bridge over a deep blue lake.
all.zh: 有一段路，列車跨越了一座深藍色湖泊上方的高聳石橋。

all.en: My mother could not stop taking photos of the breathtaking scenery.
all.zh: 我母親忍不住一直拍下令人屏息的風景。

all.en: The four-hour train ride felt like a moving postcard from start to finish.
all.zh: 那趟四小時的火車旅程從頭到尾就像一張會移動的明信片。

all.en: It was easily the most relaxing and beautiful journey of my entire life.
all.zh: 那無疑是我這輩子最放鬆、最美的一段旅程。

all.en: When we finally arrived at the highest station, the air was thin and surprisingly cold.
all.zh: 當我們終於抵達最高站時，空氣稀薄，意外地冷。

all.en: A small café near the platform served hot soup that warmed us up after the long ride.
all.zh: 月台旁的小咖啡館供應熱湯，讓我們在漫長車程後暖和起來。

all.en: We bought thick wool scarves from a local shop to protect ourselves from the freezing wind.
all.zh: 我們在當地小店買了厚厚的羊毛圍巾，抵擋刺骨的寒風。

all.en: My father chatted with an elderly Swiss gentleman who shared stories about the railway's history.
all.zh: 父親和一位年長的瑞士先生聊天，他分享了這條鐵路的歷史故事。

all.en: The gentleman explained that engineers had built the route over one hundred years ago.
all.zh: 那位先生說明，工程師在一百多年前就建造了這條路線。

all.en: We took a short cable car up to a viewing platform that overlooked three different valleys.
all.zh: 我們搭乘短程纜車前往觀景台，可以俯瞰三座不同的山谷。

all.en: My mother bought postcards from a souvenir kiosk to send to relatives back home.
all.zh: 母親在紀念品攤位買了明信片，寄給家鄉的親戚。

all.en: On the return journey, the setting sun turned the snowy peaks into shades of pink and gold.
all.zh: 回程時，夕陽把雪白的山峰染成粉紅與金黃色調。

all.en: I fell asleep against the window, listening to the gentle rhythm of the train wheels.
all.zh: 我靠著車窗睡著了，伴隨著火車車輪輕柔的節奏聲。

all.en: Years later, I still consider that train ride one of my family's happiest shared memories.
all.zh: 多年後，我仍認為那次火車之旅是我家最幸福的共同回憶之一。

all.en: That evening, our family wrote postcards together at a quiet hotel café near the railway station.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我們全家在火車站附近一間安靜的咖啡館一起寫明信片。

all.en: My father carefully described every tunnel and bridge that had impressed him during the long ride.
all.zh: 父親仔細地描述了漫長車程中令他印象深刻的每一條隧道與橋樑。

all.en: The next morning, we boarded a smaller local train heading toward a peaceful alpine village.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我們搭上一班較小的當地火車，前往一座寧靜的高山村莊。

all.en: The village had wooden chalets, ringing church bells, and cows wearing bells around their necks.
all.zh: 那座村莊有木造小屋、響亮的教堂鐘聲，還有頸上掛著鈴鐺的牛群。

all.en: We ate cheese fondue at a cozy restaurant while snow fell gently outside the window.
all.zh: 我們在一家舒適的餐廳享用起司鍋，窗外雪花輕輕飄落。

all.en: My mother bought a tiny silver charm shaped like a mountain train as a keepsake.
all.zh: 母親買了一個小小的銀色火車造型山岳吊飾，作為紀念。

all.en: That night, we soaked in a warm outdoor hot spring surrounded by white snow-covered mountains.
all.zh: 那晚，我們泡在溫暖的露天溫泉裡，周圍環繞著白雪覆蓋的群山。

all.en: On our final ride back to the city, the train moved slowly through misty river valleys.
all.zh: 在回城市的最後一段車程中，火車緩緩穿越雲霧繚繞的河谷。

all.en: My father quietly thanked my mother for planning such a wonderful family adventure together.
all.zh: 父親輕聲感謝母親規劃了如此美好的家庭冒險。

all.en: Back home, I framed our favorite photo and hung it proudly above my bedroom desk.
all.zh: 回家後，我把我們最喜歡的照片裱框，驕傲地掛在臥房書桌上方。

all.en: A year later, we decided to revisit Switzerland and ride the same scenic mountain train again.
all.zh: 一年後，我們決定重返瑞士，再次搭乘那條風景優美的山岳列車。

all.en: This time, my younger cousin joined us and could not stop pressing her face against the window.
all.zh: 這次，我表妹也加入我們，她忍不住把臉貼在車窗上。

all.en: The conductor recognized my father immediately and warmly welcomed us back like old friends.
all.zh: 列車長立刻認出我父親，熱情地把我們當老朋友一樣歡迎回來。

all.en: He surprised us by reserving the same window seats we had occupied the previous winter.
all.zh: 他驚喜地為我們保留了去年冬天坐過的同一個窗邊座位。

all.en: My mother brought along the framed photo to show the conductor how much it meant to us.
all.zh: 母親帶來那張裱框照片，讓列車長看看它對我們有多重要。

all.en: Snow had fallen heavily overnight, transforming the valleys into a glittering white wonderland.
all.zh: 前一晚下了大雪，把山谷化為閃閃發亮的白色仙境。

all.en: We sipped hot chocolate slowly while sharing memories of our previous trip together.
all.zh: 我們慢慢啜飲熱巧克力，一起分享上次旅行的回憶。

all.en: My cousin received a tiny silver mountain charm as her very first travel keepsake.
all.zh: 我表妹收到一個小小的銀色山岳吊飾，作為她的第一份旅行紀念品。

all.en: At sunset, we toasted with sparkling apple cider purchased from the elegant dining car.
all.zh: 日落時分，我們用在優雅餐車購買的氣泡蘋果汁舉杯慶祝。

all.en: That second journey proved our family's love for these mountains would last a lifetime.
all.zh: 那第二趟旅程證明了我們一家對這片群山的喜愛將會伴隨一生。

all.en: Five years later, we organized a large family reunion trip on the very same Swiss mountain railway.
all.zh: 五年後，我們在同一條瑞士山岳鐵路上規劃了一場大型的家族團聚之旅。

all.en: My younger cousin had grown into a teenager who carried her own professional camera everywhere.
all.zh: 我表妹已長成青少年，隨身帶著她自己的專業相機。

all.en: She photographed every tunnel, bridge, and frozen waterfall with surprising patience and creative skill.
all.zh: 她以驚人的耐心與創意，拍下了每一座隧道、橋樑與冰凍瀑布。

all.en: My father shared the silver mountain charm story with my aunt, who immediately ordered matching ones.
all.zh: 父親向姑姑分享了銀色山岳吊飾的故事，她立刻訂購了相同的款式。

all.en: The original conductor had since retired, but his daughter now welcomed passengers in his honored place.
all.zh: 當年的列車長已退休，但他的女兒接下了榮譽的位置，繼續迎接旅客。

all.en: She recognized our family name from her father's careful notebook of beloved regular passengers.
all.zh: 她從父親那本記錄忠實常客的筆記本中認出了我們家的名字。

all.en: That evening, we celebrated with cheese fondue at the same cozy alpine restaurant we remembered.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我們在記憶中那家舒適的高山餐廳享用了起司鍋慶祝。

all.en: My cousin filmed a short documentary about three generations sharing one mountain railway together.
all.zh: 我表妹拍了一部短紀錄片，記錄三代人共同搭乘同一條山岳鐵路的故事。

all.en: The film won a small local prize and was later screened at a Swiss tourism event.
all.zh: 這部影片榮獲一個小型的當地獎項，後來還在一場瑞士觀光活動中放映。

all.en: That trip proved our family tradition would continue passing down through every new generation to come.
all.zh: 那趟旅行證明我們的家族傳統將會一代一代繼續傳承下去。

all.en: After the Swiss screening, several European railway museums asked permission to display the documentary.
all.zh: 瑞士放映後，多家歐洲鐵道博物館請求授權展出這部紀錄片。

all.en: My cousin gladly agreed and added Mandarin subtitles to honor our grandfather's quiet wisdom.
all.zh: 我表妹欣然同意，並加上中文字幕以紀念我爺爺安靜的智慧。

all.en: Our grandfather attended one museum screening in Bern despite his careful daily medication routine.
all.zh: 我爺爺儘管每天嚴格服藥，仍堅持出席了伯恩一場博物館放映會。

all.en: He sat in the front row, holding my grandmother's old hand, watching three generations on screen.
all.zh: 他坐在前排，握著奶奶的老手，看著螢幕上的三代人。

all.en: Swiss train conductors invited him to ride in the locomotive cab for an unforgettable mountain afternoon.
all.zh: 瑞士的列車長邀請他到火車頭駕駛艙度過一個難忘的山區午後。

all.en: Photographs from that ride were printed in a small Swiss tourism magazine the very next month.
all.zh: 那次乘車的照片在隔月就刊登在一本瑞士小型觀光雜誌上。

all.en: My cousin began filming a second documentary, this time about elderly railway workers across Europe.
all.zh: 我表妹開始拍攝第二部紀錄片，這次主題是歐洲各地的老鐵道工人。

all.en: She interviewed conductors, engineers, and station managers in five gentle and historic countries.
all.zh: 她在五個溫柔而具有歷史感的國家訪問了列車長、技師與站長。

all.en: Her finished film toured small art-house theaters and inspired younger filmmakers to take up the subject.
all.zh: 她完成的影片在小型藝術電影院巡迴，並激勵年輕的影像工作者投入相同主題。

all.en: Our family railway story had quietly become a worldwide tribute to gentle workers who keep wheels turning.
all.zh: 我們家族的鐵道故事已悄悄成為一場全球性的致敬，獻給讓車輪持續轉動的溫柔工作者。

all.en: The following winter, my cousin organized a special charity screening at a small Taipei art cinema.
all.zh: 隔年冬天，我表妹在臺北一家小型藝術電影院舉辦了一場特別的慈善放映會。

all.en: All ticket proceeds supported a scholarship for young people pursuing careers in transportation engineering.
all.zh: 所有票房收入都資助一項獎學金，協助投身運輸工程的年輕人。

all.en: My father gave a short opening speech about the lifelong joy of riding scenic mountain trains.
all.zh: 我父親發表了簡短的開場致詞，談到搭乘景觀山岳列車的一生喜悅。

all.en: The retired Swiss conductor's daughter flew to Taipei to attend the screening as a guest of honor.
all.zh: 退休瑞士列車長的女兒飛來臺北，以貴賓身分出席這場放映會。

all.en: She brought her father's old conductor's hat, which we displayed gently inside a special glass case.
all.zh: 她帶來父親那頂舊的列車長帽，我們輕柔地展示在一個特別的玻璃展示櫃中。

all.en: Many young engineering students approached her afterward to ask about her father's long railway career.
all.zh: 放映後，許多年輕的工程系學生上前詢問她父親漫長的鐵道生涯。

all.en: Two of those students later won the scholarship and traveled to Switzerland for summer internships.
all.zh: 其中兩位學生後來贏得獎學金，前往瑞士進行暑期實習。

all.en: They sent us photographs from the exact stone bridge that had once enchanted our family long ago.
all.zh: 他們從那座曾經令我們家著迷的石橋寄來照片。

all.en: On quiet winter evenings, I still reread my mother's old postcards from that very first trip.
all.zh: 在寧靜的冬夜，我仍會重讀母親在第一次旅行寄出的舊明信片。

all.en: One panoramic window, one warm cup of chocolate, had opened an entire lifetime of beloved journeys.
all.zh: 一扇全景車窗、一杯溫熱的巧克力，開啟了一生珍愛的旅程。

all.en: Every winter afterward, our family booked at least one mountain train journey to a quiet alpine village.
all.zh: 之後每年冬天，我們家都會訂至少一次前往寧靜阿爾卑斯小村的山岳列車之旅。

all.en: We collected ticket stubs and pasted them carefully inside a thick album labeled Tracks of Wonder.
all.zh: 我們蒐集車票存根，小心地貼進一本厚相簿，命名為《奇蹟的軌跡》。

all.en: My parents grew older but never lost their excitement for boarding a freshly polished mountain train.
all.zh: 我父母年紀漸長，但對於登上一列擦得鋥亮的山岳列車，始終充滿興奮之情。

all.en: I learned to bring a soft blanket and one book of poetry to read between glittering windows.
all.zh: 我學會帶上一條柔軟毛毯，以及一本詩集，在閃亮的車窗之間翻閱。

all.en: We invited cousins and friends to join, slowly turning these trips into a beloved family tradition.
all.zh: 我們邀請表親與朋友加入，慢慢把這些旅程變成一項深受喜愛的家族傳統。

all.en: One year, we celebrated my parents' anniversary on the train with a small cake and quiet champagne.
all.zh: 有一年，我們在列車上為我父母慶祝結婚紀念日，準備了小蛋糕與安靜的香檳。

all.en: Other passengers softly applauded and offered warm congratulations in three different gentle languages.
all.zh: 其他旅客輕聲鼓掌，用三種不同的溫柔語言獻上熱情祝賀。

all.en: We exchanged addresses with several travelers and now sent Christmas cards across many borders.
all.zh: 我們與好幾位旅客交換地址，現在每年聖誕節都寄卡片跨越許多國界。

all.en: Each cup of hot chocolate aboard the train tasted slightly sweeter than the one before it.
all.zh: 列車上每一杯熱巧克力，都比前一杯多了一絲甜意。

all.en: Looking through frosted glass, we always agreed that mountain trains carried more than passengers onward.
all.zh: 透過結霜的車窗望出去，我們總是一致同意，山岳列車載運的不僅是乘客而已。

all.en: Last December, my own daughter requested a small mountain train journey for her tenth birthday celebration.
all.zh: 去年十二月，我女兒在她十歲生日時提出想要一趟小小的山岳列車之旅作為慶祝。

all.en: She invited three quiet classmates and we surprised them with matching woollen scarves at the platform.
all.zh: 她邀請了三位安靜的同學，我們在月台上以同款羊毛圍巾給她們驚喜。

all.en: The girls pressed their small noses against the window glass and gasped at the very first snowy mountain peak.
all.zh: 女孩們把小鼻子貼在窗玻璃上，看見第一座雪山山峰時忍不住驚呼。

all.en: Our train conductor noticed the birthday balloon and quietly added an extra slice of cake to every cup of cocoa.
all.zh: 列車長注意到生日氣球，悄悄為每一杯可可加上一塊額外的蛋糕。

all.en: My daughter wrote thank-you notes for the conductor and slipped them into the basket of warm bread rolls.
all.zh: 女兒寫了感謝小卡給列車長，把它們悄悄放進溫熱麵包卷的籃子裡。

all.en: At the alpine village station, an elderly couple greeted us with homemade gingerbread shaped like tiny trains.
all.zh: 在阿爾卑斯村莊車站，一對老夫婦用手作小列車造型薑餅迎接我們。

all.en: We spent the afternoon building snow forts and learning the local children's gentle winter songs together.
all.zh: 我們整個下午都在堆雪堡，並一起學當地孩子們溫柔的冬日歌謠。

all.en: Each classmate took home a small pressed snowflake mounted on a card, signed by my daughter herself.
all.zh: 每位同學都帶回一張小卡片，上面有壓製的雪花，由我女兒親自簽名。

all.en: On the train ride back, they fell asleep in a quiet row, their heads gently leaning together against soft seats.
all.zh: 回程的列車上，她們在一整排座位上沉沉睡去，頭輕輕地靠在彼此和柔軟座椅上。

all.en: I tucked the album beside my mother's old postcards, knowing the journey had begun anew in tinier hands.
all.zh: 我把這本相簿放到母親的舊明信片旁，知道這段旅程已在更小的手中重新展開。

all.en: We boarded early to grab seats on the sunny side of the carriage.
all.zh: 我們提早上車，搶到了車廂向陽那一側的座位。

all.en: The train climbed slowly, hugging the edge of a deep green valley.
all.zh: 火車緩緩爬升，緊貼著一道深綠色山谷的邊緣。

all.en: A gentle ding announced each tunnel before we plunged into darkness.
all.zh: 每進入隧道前都會響起輕柔的鈴聲，接著我們便墜入黑暗。

all.en: I pressed my forehead to the cold glass to watch the waterfalls rush by.
all.zh: 我把額頭貼在冰冷的玻璃上，看著瀑布飛快掠過。

all.en: A vendor pushed a cart down the aisle selling hot tea and snacks.
all.zh: 一名小販推著餐車沿走道叫賣熱茶和點心。

all.en: The higher we went, the more snow clung to the rocky slopes.
all.zh: 我們爬得越高，岩坡上附著的積雪就越多。

all.en: My mother dozed off, lulled by the steady rocking of the train.
all.zh: 媽媽被火車平穩的搖晃哄睡，打起了瞌睡。

all.en: At one curve, I could see both the engine and the last carriage at once.
all.zh: 在某個彎道上，我同時看見了車頭和最後一節車廂。

all.en: We stepped onto the platform into crisp air that smelled of pine.
all.zh: 我們踏上月台，迎面而來的是帶著松木香的清新空氣。

all.en: I jotted down every village name so I could remember the route later.
all.zh: 我把每個村莊的名字都記了下來，好讓自己日後想起這條路線。
